Events Submit Match

Junebugs Are Club Cup Champions!

April 4, 2026

We did it. Junebug Pickleball Club are your Club Cup Champions. 🏆🔥

This past weekend, we traveled to PALA Pickleball Club — an established facility, their home court, with a full roster of players ready to defend it. And we walked out with the win.

That says everything about who we are as a club. We didn’t just show up to compete — we showed up to prove something. And we did exactly that.

Every single player brought their best. The belief we have in each other on and off the court is what separates this group. We went into enemy territory and came out champions.

This is only the beginning for Junebug Pickleball Club. The foundation is set, the standard is raised, and the best is still ahead.

Club Cup Champions. Let’s go Junebugs! 🐞🔥

Junebug Pickleball League • junebugpickleballclub@gmail.com
